| `host-adapter-admit-distribution` | `read_only` | `envelope_optional` | `allowlist_only` | <code>forge-core host-adapter-admit-distribution --artifact &lt;name&gt; [--target &lt;codex\|cursor\|claude\|opencode\|vscode\|pidev\|forge_standalone\|custom&gt;] [--channel &lt;stable\|canary\|dev&gt;] [--sha256 &lt;digest&gt;] [--signature-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--provenance-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--source-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--version &lt;value&gt;] [--compatible-core-version &lt;value&gt;] [--rollback-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--update-summary-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--explicit-canary-opt-in] [--json\|--no-json]</code> |
| `host-adapter-verify-artifact` | `read_only` | `envelope_optional` | `allowlist_only` | <code>forge-core host-adapter-verify-artifact --artifact-path &lt;path&gt; --sha256 &lt;digest&gt; [--signature-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--provenance-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--source-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--version &lt;value&gt;] [--compatible-core-version &lt;value&gt;] [--rollback-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--update-summary-ref &lt;ref&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code> |
| `host-adapter-verify-provenance` | `read_only` | `envelope_optional` | `allowlist_only` | <code>forge-core host-adapter-verify-provenance --artifact-path &lt;path&gt; --provenance-path &lt;path&gt; --signature-path &lt;path&gt; --public-key-path &lt;path&gt; --transparency-log-path &lt;path&gt; --sha256 &lt;digest&gt; --expected-builder-id &lt;id&gt; --expected-source-uri &lt;uri&gt; --expected-source-ref &lt;ref&gt; [--json\|--no-json]</code> |

| `start` | `mutates_forge_state` | `envelope_optional` | `allowlist_only` | <code>forge-core start [--root &lt;path&gt;] [--agent-id &lt;id&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code> |
| `mcp` | `adapter_protocol` | `protocol_stream` | `allowlist_only` | <code>forge-core mcp serve [--allowlist &lt;yaml&gt;] [--principal-registry &lt;yaml&gt;] [--deployment-policy &lt;yaml&gt;] [--snapshot &lt;state-relative-yaml&gt;] [--replay-anchor &lt;absolute-operator-json&gt;] [--enable-trusted-single-effect\|--enable-trusted-operation-wide] [--root &lt;path&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code><br><code>forge-core mcp snapshot --root &lt;path&gt; --operation &lt;ref&gt; --assurance &lt;ref&gt; [--command &lt;ref&gt;] --principal-registry &lt;yaml&gt; --credential-id &lt;id&gt; --nonce &lt;value&gt; [--output &lt;state-relative-yaml&gt;] [--now-unix &lt;i64&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code><br><code>forge-core mcp credential &lt;provision\|rotate\|revoke\|sign&gt; [operator-owned options] [--json\|--no-json]</code><br><code>forge-core mcp readiness --root &lt;path&gt; --allowlist &lt;yaml&gt; --principal-registry &lt;yaml&gt; --deployment-policy &lt;yaml&gt; --snapshot &lt;state-relative-yaml&gt; --replay-anchor &lt;absolute-operator-json&gt; --secret-dir &lt;path&gt; --credential-id &lt;id&gt; [--client-config-output &lt;json&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code><br><code>forge-core mcp replay-anchor &lt;provision\|verify\|advance&gt; --root &lt;path&gt; --anchor &lt;absolute-operator-json&gt; [--deployment-id &lt;id&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code> |
| `research` | `mixed_by_subcommand` | `envelope_optional` | `allowlist_only` | <code>forge-core research source add  --source-file &lt;path&gt; --policy-file &lt;path&gt; [--root &lt;path&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code><br><code>forge-core research source list [--root &lt;path&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code><br><code>forge-core research check       [--root &lt;path&gt;] [--evidence-file &lt;path&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code><br><code>forge-core research graph       [--root &lt;path&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code><br><code>forge-core research cite        --source-id &lt;id&gt; [--root &lt;path&gt;] [--evidence-file &lt;path&gt;] [--json\|--no-json]</code> |

## Regeneration

```bash
cargo run -p forge-core-command-surface --example generate_command_surface_docs
cargo run -p forge-core-command-surface --example generate_command_surface_docs -- --check
```
